follow_up_coverage: Follow-up cycle 72 hours: multiple tabloid reprints, fan account aggregation, Instagram activity analysis
details_public: Daily Mail had photograph. Unambiguous proximity. Sardinia location confirmed. No context. No statement from either party.
details_private: They were in Sardinia for three weeks. La Terrazza crew present. Vittoria arrived as a guest of the summer circuit, not as Alex's guest specifically. The photograph happened on the third day. He didn't find out the Mail had it until Kevin mentioned it.
flair_note: Tommaso found the situation extremely funny. Said so, repeatedly. Vittoria was unfazed. Alex was annoyed about the photograph for approximately 48 hours and then moved on.

details_private: Brief. Ibiza context. Nothing that required conversation or management.

details_private: Carnegie Hall October 17. After-party Tribeca. Taylor Russell was at the show — she has a documented interest in classical music. The photograph was taken at the after-party, not the concert.

follow_up_coverage: Multiple reposts across r/AlexWilson and Olivia Rodrigo fan accounts. 72-hour cycle. Both fan communities briefly feral. Died down when no photo emerged.
details_public: DeuxMoi blind: 'Classical heir and major pop artist — Glastonbury weekend — very close energy, multiple people saw them together.' Fan accounts cross-referenced both their whereabouts in the VIP field on the same evening. No statement from either party.
details_private: Glastonbury. Both on the VIP circuit. Their paths crossed in the hospitality area, not the crowd. Camille saw it and said nothing for three days. Tommy was also at Glastonbury and has opinions he has kept exclusively to himself.
flair_note: The one where the age match (both born 2003) sent the internet briefly feral. Classical music press: zero coverage. Pop press: 48 hours of 'are they??' then silence when no photo landed.
